entries.description: MCP gateway for nano-vm: FSM-governed execution of LLM agent pipelines. Each step is an explicit state transition, not an LLM routing decision. Produces ExecutionReceipt = f(Trace) — deterministic, recomputable from execution_traces without re-running the model. Self-hosted (PyPI package, stdio/SSE transport) — not a public live endpoint.
representativeQueries: execute a multi-step LLM agent workflow with a replayable execution trace
suspend and resume a multi-turn agent session with persisted state
get a deterministic audit receipt for an agent's tool calls
run an FSM-governed pipeline and inspect rejected transitions

data.name: nano-vm-mcp
data.description: Gateway for llm-nano-vm: FSM execution kernel exposed as MCP tools, SQLite-backed execution traces.

tools.name: run_program
tools.description: Execute a Program through the FSM kernel and persist the resulting Trace.

tools.name: vm_step
tools.description: Single-step channel-adapter primitive: (session_id, input) -> output, with suspend/resume via _GatewayCursorRepository.

tools.name: get_trace
tools.description: Retrieve a stored Trace and its projected execution_traces rows by execution_id.

tools.name: debug_trace
tools.description: Auto-diagnostic on FAILED traces via Agent Debugger integration (opt-in, AGENT_DEBUGGER_TOKEN).

tools.name: get
tools.description: Retrieve a stored program by id.

tools.name: delete
tools.description: Delete a stored program and cascade its traces.
